title: Bilbob
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Bilbob.jpg]] |name=Bilbob |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Horville's Hut of Horrors]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Bilbob the Mystic, who knows your future.''"
"''Dooooom…|Horville and Bilbob|{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}}}} '''Bilbob''' the Mystic was a fortune teller of thin, [[Color/Legends|purple]]-skinned [[Species/Legends|species]] at [[Horville's Hut of Horrors]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{Ewoks|Horville's Hut of Horrors (episode)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Bilbob }} [[Category:Endorians]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]]
